ogTitle: Dumgree vs Dumpy Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dumgree and Dumpy Creek.
heading: Dumgree vs Dumpy Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dumgree, Queensland and Dumpy Creek, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dumpy Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Dumgree (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dumgree or Dumpy Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dumgree has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Dumpy Creek scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dumgree scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Dumpy Creek scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dumgree or Dumpy Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dumpy Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
